title: パワフル最強シンデレラ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I am the prince of this kingdom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Luxurious parties continue day and night within
my castle. These events are the height of
extravagance and see me fed with only the most
lavish of meals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet, I am dissatisfied with this lifestyle. Is
there nothing that can help me break free from
this dreary monotony?
BAM!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, one of the castle's outer walls
crumbles! The dust clears to reveal a lone girl
standing atop the debris!

I've finally arrived at the kingdom's castle! My, it's
so brilliant and dazzling and beautiful!
This is a castle truly fit for one such as myself!

Oh my! I take it that you're the prince? Oh, how
I've yearned to meet you! You are quite literally
the prince of my dreams!
Allow me to introduce myself. I am the one and only...

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text: Cinderella!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella's Stepmother
text_block_list.text: C-Cinderella?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella's Stepsister
text_block_list.text: But we left you behind at the manor!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text: I ran a hundred kilometers to get here!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text:
I climbed mountains, leapt across valleys,
shattered boulders, swam through raging rapids...

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text:
And after overcoming a series of misfortunes, I've
finally arrived at the party I've long awaited!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still don't quite understand what's going on, but
this girl seems pretty amazing.
Wheeze... Wheeze... H-hey! Cinderella! Wait right there!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text: Oh? Who might you be?
Pant... Phew... H-hang on a second... I need some water... We had to run all this way, too, you know?
Gulp, gulp... Ahhh! Okay! Prepare to have your mind blown, Cinderella! For I am...

text_block_list.name: The Sorceress
text_block_list.text: The Sorceress!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wait, did this "sorceress" also run a hundred
kilometers to get here?!
That's... not all! Wheeze... Huff... There's me—wheeze—and...

text_block_list.name: Vodka the Fairy
text_block_list.text: M-me, the sorceress's... wheeze, wheeze... fairies! Pant... Phew!

text_block_list.name: The Sorceress
text_block_list.text:
Cinderella! You came all this way on your own?
And just when I was about to assist you with my
wondrous magic!

text_block_list.name: The Sorceress
text_block_list.text:
I guess you won't be needing that pumpkin
carriage. Or a magical device to help you cross
those treacherous mountains. Hmm... What's left
that you need?

text_block_list.name: Scarlet the Fairy
text_block_list.text:
Sorceress! I think she could use an elegant dress
befitting this lavish party!

text_block_list.name: Vodka the Fairy
text_block_list.text: Wrong, Scarlet! What she needs is a pair of glass slippers! Some really sweet and stylish ones!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet the Fairy
text_block_list.text: Oh, what do you know?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka the Fairy
text_block_list.text: Say what?!
choice_data_list: You two sure get on well.
You two sure get on well.

text_block_list.name: The Two Fairies
text_block_list.text: Do not!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text:
What do you think, my prince? A beautiful dress
or glass slippers, which should I choose?
choice_data_list: I think you're perfect just the way you are.
I think you're perfect just the way you are.
You should accentuate your strong points!

text_block_list.name: The Sorceress
text_block_list.text: Huhhh?! You mean you don't want either?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True beauty has nothing to do with your
appearance. I tell Cinderella what really counts is
your heart and how you show it.

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text:
I see! It's just like my beloved Princess Fighter
said! "You shouldn't judge people based on how
they look!"

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text: So, basically... what you're saying is that I'm already a princess, right?!
choice_data_list: You're the very definition of a princess!
You're the very definition of a princess!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! I'm as princess as can be!

text_block_list.name: The Sorceress
text_block_list.text:
Geez! Then what did we come all this way for?! I
don't get you people!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text: Huh?! My strong points?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She ran a hundred kilometers over perilous
terrain. That kind of powerful physical ability is
remarkable. She has limitless potential!
choice_data_list: Join me and pursue a career as an athlete!
Join me and pursue a career as an athlete!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text: Me? An athlete?!

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text:
Th-then... the thing I should ask the sorceress for
is...

text_block_list.name: Cinderella
text_block_list.text: A pair of training shoes!

text_block_list.name: The Sorceress
text_block_list.text:
Come ooon, you don't need magic to get training
shoes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep-beep-beep! Beep-beep-beep!
choice_data_list: Wha?! ...Oh, it was all a dream.
